title: anthemis cretica subsp. subcinerea
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. subcinerea, also known as Dwarf Chamois or Dwarf Chamomile, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils such as borneol and camphor. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica subsp. subcinerea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin irritations and wounds.
